problem id: 789b83ce
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(3) XOR SHR(1)

examples:
  11111011 -> 10100101
  11011000 -> 10101100
  11101101 -> 00011110
  10110001 -> 11010000
  11100100 -> 01010010
  00101111 -> 01101111
  10010111 -> 11110011
  10000100 -> 01100010
  00010011 -> 10010001
  01011000 -> 11101100

query: 11001101
predicted answer: 00001110
